document_id: Ombudsman Listed by Area Agency on Aging

findings.description: The HTML omits Region E's phone line labeled as an extension, losing table cell data.
findings.evidence: PDF Region E shows: "P: (828) 485-4213" and a separate line "P: (828) 485-4271 ext. 410" with "F: (828) 322-5991." HTML Region E shows only "P: (828) 485-4213", "P: (828) 485-4271", and "F: (828) 322-5991"; the "ext. 410" is missing.

findings.description: Heading hierarchy does not reflect the document structure and uses the wrong top-level title.
findings.evidence: PDF top headings are centered text: "Division of Aging", "North Carolina Long Term Care Ombudsman Program", then "Office of the State Long Term Care Ombudsman." HTML uses a page header div for the first two lines and promotes only "Office of the State Long Term Care Ombudsman" to <h1>, which is not the document title and weakens the heading structure.
